title: Easier Netherite
description: A mod that adds a few new blocks, items, crafting recipes, and a few other things to make netherite less boring and tedious to get wile keeping the difficulty
body:
This mod aims to improve upon the vanilla game by adding another way to get netherite. Normally you would strip mine or bed/TNT mine but that's tedious and repetitive and I'm a fan of making progress in the game so i made this mod to add a more fun way to get netherite but still make it be hard to do sense it takes i lot for only a small piece but that should be no problem to anyone that likes to grind out max gear. I definitely recommend using this in a modpack where there are better gears and such that require netherite in large quantities.


Netherite Upgrade Template Fragment added as of 0.0.10-1.20

Netherite Upgrade Template Fragment's have been added to the 0.0.10-1.20 version of this mod which can be used to craft netherite upgrade template much easier to craft which, personally, i think is a nice thing to have. to see the recipes you can use jei, rei, or any other mod that show recipes for items. i might upload recipe images soon but im really procrastinating it. sry.

Updating The Forge Version

I really want to update the forge version and i think it'll get a lot of downloads but im garbage at forge modding and im am the lord of procrastinating things and only do productive stuff when im in the mood 5 in the morning or absolutely have to only a few hours before the deadline. sooo...... im not sure how long it'll be. But it will happen. I guarantee it.


This mod adds these items:

Netherite Upgrade Template Fragment
Plated Diamond
Reinforced Crystal
Celestial Crystal
Cracked Celestial Crystal
Hard Crystal Fragment
Liquidized End Crystal
Nether Fragment
Netherite Scrap Piece
Reinforced Crystal Dust
Block of Reinforced Crystal


This mod is only intended for expanding netherite gathering and though these items could have other potential that is not my goal for this mod.
Feel free to make addons or mods that add more functionality to them though.

If you  find any bugs with the fabric versions, know that this mod is manufactured and play tested in fabric and some stuff can slip by me but i make the forge versions after I'm sure that its all good.
